mapper.insert: INSERT INTO bus_city_codes ( city_code, city_name, synced_at ) VALUES ( #{cityCode}, #{cityName}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE city_name = VALUES(city_name), synced_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP

INSERT INTO bus_stops ( node_id, node_name, node_no, city_code, latitude, longitude, synced_at ) VALUES ( #{nodeId}, #{nodeName}, #{nodeNo}, #{cityCode}, #{latitude}, #{longitude}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE node_name = VALUES(node_name), node_no = VALUES(node_no), city_code = VALUES(city_code), latitude = VALUES(latitude), longitude = VALUES(longitude), synced_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT node_id, node_name, node_no, city_code, latitude, longitude, ( 6371000 * ACOS( COS(RADIANS(#{latitude})) * COS(RADIANS(latitude)) * COS(RADIANS(longitude) - RADIANS(#{longitude})) + SIN(RADIANS(#{latitude})) * SIN(RADIANS(latitude)) ) ) AS distance_m FROM bus_stops WHERE latitude BETWEEN #{latitude} - (#{radiusMeters} / 111320.0) AND #{latitude} + (#{radiusMeters} / 111320.0) AND longitude BETWEEN #{longitude} - (#{radiusMeters} / (111320.0 * COS(RADIANS(#{latitude})))) AND #{longitude} + (#{radiusMeters} / (111320.0 * COS(RADIANS(#{latitude})))) ) nearby WHERE distance_m <= #{radiusMeters} ORDER BY distance_m ASC LIMIT #{limit}
